title: Prompt
description: On-disk prompt definition (info.json) for both standalone-scripts/prompts/ and standalone-scripts/macro-prompts/. PascalCase keys, additionalProperties:false.

Slug.description: Globally unique slug. Equals the directory slug segment after the NNN- numeric prefix.

EmitsScore.description: If true, prompt body must produce a `Score: N/100` line parsable by the canonical regex.

WritesTo.description: Path globs the engine permits this prompt to write to. Globs may contain {{ Variable }} placeholders.

Variables.description: Declared variables. Empty array is valid; key must never be omitted.
